projectDescription: PressureLight (压感光护) is a smart pressure-sensing illuminated safety garment with an integrated SOS system that triggers visual/vibration alerts and sends GPS location to emergency contacts via a mobile web page.
keyFeatures: Pressure-sensitive fabric matrix triggers SOS automatically
ESP32-powered LED strip flashes red and white as a visual alarm
Vibration motor provides tactile alert on SOS activation
Mobile web helper page captures iPhone GPS with high accuracy
One-tap copy or SMS deep-link to send location to emergency contacts
Apple Maps and Google Maps links included in every SOS message
No app install required — works in iPhone Safari
Privacy-safe: location only captured on user action, SMS sent manually
publicApiSurface: SOS message format: name, coordinates, accuracy, timestamp, map links
